name: Brittney Lewis
ai_summary: Brittney Lewis is an outgoing individual from Augusta, GA with PT availability (8:30 AM - 1:00 PM). She is patient, dependable, and passionate about working with children, with a conflict resolution approach focused on separating children to ensure safety.

transcripts.q3: About me. My name is Brittany. I'm 26. I'm very outgoing. I'm very good with good customer service. I manage my time effectively and I love meeting new people doing new things.
